description_long: This is a medium-sized, single-family house situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a light-colored facade, likely clad in siding or painted wood. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, and a small porch with steps and railings marks the entryway. The property extends to a body of water at the rear, suggesting a waterfront location, and the surrounding landscape is grassy with a paved road at the front. The house appears to have a single story with a raised foundation and a modest footprint. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A single-story, gable-roofed house with a light facade, symmetrical windows, and a small front porch, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and waterfront access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, the length of the house, and the proximity to the water at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view facing the water, showing the back of the house and the waterfront edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway and road visible, as well as the house's side elevation.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and simple railings
